description: THE THESIS -- final and complete doctrine. Install as ~/.claude/skills/forge-4d/SKILL.md, REPLACING tungsten-forge and EDGE_DOCTRINE entirely (their discipline is preserved inside; their framing is superseded). Nine parts: the Maze (Dijkstra->A*), the Spectrum (bands we never read -- vol-of-vol IC +0.045), the Chemistry (bonded elements release +1.7 ATR), the Voxel (65k lived moments with full metadata + their futures), the Weather Model (soft state beats hard regimes +0.036 vs +0.001; gated states triple forward move to +1.008 ATR t=4.11), the Cartographer (A* retrieval, conviction gates accuracy, novelty guard), the Horizon (no 80% next-bar; the constellation, not the dot), the Striving (57% is not a ceiling), the Discipline (all gates unchanged), the Voice (new logging, no outdated traces).
